info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications GSMA Camara Project Edge Application Management API
Global System for Mobile Communications Retrieve a list of existing Applications

items.docs:
Get the list of all existing Application definitions from the
Edge Cloud Provider that the user has permission to view.

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Submit application metadata to the Edge Cloud Provider.

items.docs:
Contains the information about the application to be
instantiated in the Edge Cloud

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Retrieve the information of an Application

params.name: appId
params.description:
A globally unique identifier associated with the
application.
Edge Cloud Provider generates this identifier when the application
is submitted.

items.docs: Ask the Edge Cloud Provider the information for a given application

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Delete an Application from an Edge Cloud Provider

params.name: appId
params.description:
Identificator of the application to be
deleted provided by the Edge Cloud Provider
once the submission was successful

items.docs: Delete all the information and content related to an Application

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Retrieve the information of Application Instances for a given App

params.name: appId
params.description:
A globally unique identifier associated with
the application.
Edge Cloud Provider generates this identifier when the
application is submitted.

params.name: appInstanceId
params.description:
A globally unique identifier associated with a running
instance of an application within an specific Edge Cloud Zone.
Edge Cloud Provider generates this identifier.

params.name: region
params.description:
Human readable name of the geographical Edge Cloud Region of
the Edge Cloud. Defined by the Edge Cloud Provider.

items.docs:
Ask the Edge Cloud Provider the information of the instances for a
given application

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Instantiation of an Application

items.docs:
Ask the Edge Cloud Platform to instantiate an application to one
or several Edge Cloud Zones with an Application as an input and an
Application Instance as the output.

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Terminate an Application Instance

params.name: appInstanceId
params.description:
Identificator of the specific application instance
that will be terminated

items.docs:
Terminate a running instance of an application within
an Edge Cloud Zone

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Retrieve a list of the operators Edge Cloud Zones and their status

params.name: region
params.description:
Human readable name of the geographical Edge Cloud Region of
the Edge Cloud. Defined by the Edge Cloud Provider.

params.name: status
params.description: Human readable status of the Edge Cloud Zone

items.docs:
List of the operators Edge Cloud Zones and their
status, ordering the results by location and filtering by
status (active/inactive/unknown)
